love it.

Yeah.
So I'll see if Nick is going to join.

Yeah.

that one, that seems like, or you told me, it seems like we're getting there.

good.

So that's how it was, like, very ad hoc and last minute.
Okay.
And so are we kind of worried that this is not going to have a showing?
I guess that's the main thing.
I'm trying to understand that.
Yeah.
Go ahead.

We should ramp that up.

Like, we can totally do that.
There's tools to make that easier.
We suggested using some automation tools, are, like, automating, like, LinkedIn DMs or XDMs.
But I haven't really heard from her since last...
Friday, so we're just continuing to bug her.
think Gloria already picked her maybe yesterday or the day before.

is the...

Okay, yeah, but Seattle, I mean, Seattle and New York.

mean, yeah.

Yeah, and then on the like CRM, just tooling side of things, this one kind of goes across like what you do on socials and also these events, like basically one kind of motion that we use a lot is like we post a bunch on socials, you guys are doing the same now, and they're kind of tools, like you don't have to use this one, we're like, okay, like here's a post that we did, we define a like, ICP of people you care about, and then you can just see like a feed of people that engage, and I think the sense of being a nice way to feed just very

Can you use this one to, like, do the automated DMs?
Is that kind of what you're using that for?
Yeah, this one can either do it or it has the, like, integration.
So you use, like, we actually use this.
It's called HayReach to do the DM.
But yeah, like, through this tool and another tool, you can basically do that.
Does SIFT do the enrichment or do you do the enrichment first?
SIFT does the, like, hey, so the model is, like, you pick a set of accounts that you listen to and you can actually pick other people's accounts, which is kind of interesting.
And then it takes the engagements.
It filters that down to the people you care about.
It does the enrichment.
And then the actual, like, thing.
The model of sending the message, I'm not actually sure if it does, that for LinkedIn, we then use HeyReach, or if you want, we use Instantly, I think.
I've been looking at some enrichment vendors for other DM purposes, so I'm curious.
Yeah, so that's something we could do, and it kind of links your socials with everything else.

And then, yeah, guess, you know, I think the way we're thinking about what we're doing is mostly we're just like a, like, we have concepts and ideas, then we just throw it over, and then it depends on how much kind of more shaping you guys need, but, you know, we're kind of just treating the benchmark site, it seemed like a cool idea.
I think Ren was asking.

Yeah, yeah, so I think we've been, we're going to run on this, and I think it's, there might be one more round, but, like, we've gotten pretty much to where we're, we're kind of comfortable with just, like, you know, we actually.
Have to build the guts of it and then actually get the data.
The data piece actually is having a little bit of problems right now, so we're kind of focused on that.
But, yeah, I think we have all the pieces on the table now for this, so appreciate your guys' visual representation of it so that we could actually make a play to get it to the finish line.
Cool.

I guess, yeah, I mean, I guess part of what I wanted to do is just, like, make things a little bit more, kind of, not predictable, but, like, we know the thing that you guys need help with and that's valuable, so at least how we're thinking about that one is just, like, opportunistically or maybe at your prompting, like, we just have, you folks on the team that are pretty good at design who can do this kind of stuff.
So, this is, yeah, these will treat us like, we'll just wait to see if you need any more help and then we'll just periodically propose new ideas based on what we see working.
Yeah, sounds good.
Okay, so that sounds good.
We're still kind of having a go at repackaging content that's out there.
We're working with a few, like, guys, so that's coming.
And then I took a look at, like, our initial, like, oh, here are all the things that we want to try from, like, a month or two ago.
And some of the things that, you know, still, like, make sense is, like, you know, we still have a very good videographer and producer.
So if there's anything video you guys want to experiment with, they have a little capacity.

So I'll just flag that.
And then we mentioned you have a decently sized mailing list, both for DA and for Surge.
So I'll say, like, for those ideas, did any of those seem interesting or worth pursuing at this time?
I've been looking at my video for a bit for DA so that might be relevant.
I'll leave it up to her as to what that might actually look like.
Yeah, there's a few things in motion right now, but let's think on that maybe next week or at least.
Okay, sure.
Yeah, yeah.
The other thing is the same with us.
So video-wise, like, that's intriguing.
I can't think of anything too much yet, but, like, I think, I mean, there are, like, seeds of ideas that we could go, but newsletter, definitely not on our mind at the moment.
That's, yeah, probably, like, probably like a next year thing.
Okay, we can, we'll deprioritize.
Yeah, but in general, I think if you guys are doing filming in SF, yeah, we're, like, very easy for us to support anything there, and then, yeah, if there's other ideas, we can help as needed.
For the video, I guess one random idea we had was the podcast idea where we'd be interviewing, chatting with some of our customers.
Nick would do that or something.
Edwin doesn't want to do that.
Is that a direction you guys would be able to support?
Yeah, I mean, we do our own, actually.
don't if you've seen it.
I've got my brain.
We have this kind of community where we do this stuff.
like, you know, we have our own clip machine.
do podcasts.
We do kind of...
Like, sit down.
I mean, ours is mostly about marketing stuff, but we would be able to...
Bring this setup to really any space, depending on what vibe you're going for.
We just use our office and the editing and the post-editing clip process.
can definitely do that a lot for ourselves.
Okay, good to know.
So I think apart from these main lanes that we're working on is monitoring prospect kind of support and outreach.
And then we're building a list of influencers, newsletters, and places where you can essentially amplify things you're already doing.
Liz, did I leave anything?
Anything out?
Not that I can think of.
I think you were, you had an extra thread around, I think because Edwin was really interested in employee engagement stuff.
Yeah.

Yeah, I spent so much time there that, like, it was frustrating, but basically, like, there's, at least with Assembly, like, I know you guys want the link, maybe, like, a more kind of flexible way of, like, automating that, like, you probably want to pipe into a channel and say, like, at channel, you know, here's a post from Edwin, please, like, comment, or something like that, but, like, I mean, I've been talking to them, Steve, they just, like, they just can't do that yet, anyway, I'm trying to get them to build it, but I guess, I guess I have to double click with Evan on what he actually wants, because to me, it looks like his posts get a lot of employee engagement, like, it's, it's more than ever I've seen at other companies where, you know, people, like, employees don't even engage at all, like, I see a ton of people engage in his posts, or the company's posts, so um, yeah,
I don't really find wrong at the moment.
So I just, I think I'm going to just see what he actually is looking, what he's missing, I guess, from that, like what he's worried that we're not doing.
You can see it's like, you know, all, like there's, you know, all the likes, whatever, those are most, like a lot of our employees.
Yeah, which is totally, like, I think LinkedIn in general, the people that you actually want to look at the posts almost never like anyway, like that's what we've noticed.
So like the likes from your own team is just like validation.
Yeah, yeah.
People read a post with like one like, they're just like, what the hell is this?
Like visually, I'm sure it's like impression stats look pretty good.
Yeah, so I'll just say it's like, it seems like it's harder than, you know, we thought to just scrape this.
You know, LinkedIn doesn't really like scraping social posts, so they do everything they can, same with X.
So let us know, I guess, what he actually wants and then see how we can support her.
Like, this tool, I think, might be interesting.
So this is interesting.
Yeah, can start a little Yeah, might be interesting just because it will then connect our linked engagements into stuff like the events, right?
And it can, like, and make, maybe other things if we decide to do in the future.
yeah, so, so I, I, I'm, I'm curious about this one.
Okay, we can, uh, we've been working on this here on stuff, uh, with Solly, so this kind of, kind of connect with that.
Um, okay, I think that those are most of the, um, things we wanted to talk about.
Anything to dive deep on, Akash, I know you joined slightly later.
Bye.
No, I just read the notes beforehand, too, and I'm looking forward to just seeing more content.
And, yeah, JP's notes hopefully were helpful.
I think Nancy and Jason were chatting with him.
But, yeah, I'm just looking forward to seeing how this goes.
That's good.
All right, we'll end a little bit earlier.
Thank you, guys.
Thank you.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on marketing initiatives and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content is scaling:** 7 DA articles are ready for publication. The focus now shifts to programmatic content (e.g., salary calculators) and monitoring Reddit for community insights.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [**Event outreach is the key bottleneck:** The Seattle event's 2,000-person list requires a decision on automation (e.g., LinkedIn DMs) to meet its 25-attendee goal. The New York dinner needs a go-ahead from Sully/Nick to start invites.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**New tool proposed to connect social engagement to sales:** GrowthX pitched SIFT, a tool that filters social post engagers by ICP, enriches their data, and feeds them into outreach campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [**Video production is a potential new initiative:** GrowthX has capacity for video, including a podcast format. Surge AI will explore this, while a newsletter is confirmed as a 2026 priority.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Data Annotation (DA) Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
      - [**Status:** 7 articles are ready for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [**Focus:** Repackaging existing blog content for a new audience (those evaluating DA).](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
      - [**Feedback Process:** JP will now review DA articles for factual accuracy only, unblocking the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**New Content Initiatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [**Programmatic:** Developing salary calculators and benchmarks.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [**Social Listening:** Monitoring Reddit for community questions (e.g., "alternatives to outliers?") to inform content and future automated commenting.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [**Benchmark Site:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
      - [**Status:** Design is complete; Surge AI is now focused on building the site and sourcing data.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)

### Event Planning & Outreach

  - [**Seattle Event:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Challenge:** The 2,000-person outreach list is the primary bottleneck to hitting the 25-attendee goal.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [**Proposed Solution:** GrowthX suggested using automation (e.g., LinkedIn DMs) and offered to set up the tools.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [**Urgency:** On-site signage designs must be finalized this week to avoid expedited shipping costs and risks.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [**New York Dinner:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Status:** Awaiting go-ahead from Sully/Nick to begin invites for the event, which is 3–4 weeks away.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [**NeurIPS (San Diego):**](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [**Status:** On track; a sponsored influencer is handling the event turnkey.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)

### New Initiatives & Tooling

  - [**Employee Engagement:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
      - [**Context:** Edwin requested a more flexible way to automate employee engagement on social posts.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Direct scraping of social posts is difficult due to platform restrictions.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Mason will clarify Edwin's specific needs before exploring solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [**SIFT Tool Proposal:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Functionality:** Monitors social posts, filters engagers by ICP, enriches their data, and feeds them into outreach campaigns via tools like HeyReach.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Connects social engagement directly to the sales funnel.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [**Video Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [**Capacity:** GrowthX has a videographer/producer available.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [**Idea:** A podcast format interviewing customers, hosted by Nick.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Status:** Surge AI will explore this idea.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
      - [Follow up with Sully/Nick on Seattle outreach automation and the NY dinner go-ahead.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [Finalize Seattle signage designs this week.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
      - [Clarify Edwin's employee engagement needs with Mason.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [**Surge AI:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Explore the podcast/video idea with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Xzf1o8kWArrMDNAAKtZ4X4fw-8NST7QL?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

action_items.description: Send DA articles to JP pre-publish; request quick fact-check
Email Sully re: Seattle outreach; CC Mason; request 15–20 emails/day
Check w/ Sully re: LinkedIn outreach profile (Edwin)
Decide on DA video/podcast next week
Confirm w/ Edwin employee-engagement needs; then evaluate Assembly/SIFT
